title: fix: lower app_listed quest reward to 10 pollen
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Lowers the **App listed on Pollinations** quest reward from 15 → 10 pollen
- Updates the catalog test assertion to match
- No catalog version bump needed — `quests:catalog` cache has a 60s TTL, so the new amount propagates within a minute

gist.headline: Balancing the nectar
gist.blurb: We've fine-tuned the pollen rewards for listing your app on Pollinations to keep the ecosystem balanced.
gist.summary: The reward for completing the 'App listed on Pollinations' quest has been adjusted from 15 to 10 Pollen.
gist.impact: Developers will now receive 10 Pollen when their app is successfully listed in the ecosystem.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) carefully organizing or balancing small glowing pollen drops on a tiny wooden scale, representing the rebalancing of quest rewards.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot carefully balancing glowing yellow pollen drops on a tiny wooden scale. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot carefully balancing glowing yellow pollen drops on a tiny wooden scale. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background.
